vulnerabilities.title: OS Command Injection in pomelo-monitor
vulnerabilities.description: pomelo-monitor through 0.3.7 is vulnerable to Command Injection.It allows injection of arbitrary commands as part of 'pomelo-monitor' params.

vulnerabilities.title: Remote Code Execution in pomelo-monitor
vulnerabilities.description:
All versions of `pomelo-monitor` are vulnerable to Remote Code Execution. Due to insufficient input validation an attacker could run arbitrary commands on the server thus rendering the package vulnerable to Remote Code Execution.


## Recommendation

No fix is currently available. Consider using an alternative module until a fix is made available.
